title: CMM
description: Create Magic & More (CMM) fuses the mechanical brilliance of Create with the arcane mastery of Ars Nouveau. Automate, enchant, and explore a world where gears turn and spells flow in harmony — creativity and magic, working hand in hand.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad7fa005de3b6a4c0a1ef8fe41a7a084da422c10_0.webp)

# Create, Magic and More (CMM) blends the mechanical elegance of Create with the arcane flair of Ars Nouveau, offering you a sandbox where automation and spellcasting go hand in hand.

### Features

**★ Engineering meets magic**: Use belts, gears and contraptions alongside spell books, enchantments and magical rituals.

**★ Smooth progression**: From simple machines to complex magical networks — grow your empire at your own pace.

**★ Multiplayer & server-ready**: Designed to work seamlessly in client & server mode; bring friends, build collaboratives or impose your will solo.

**★ Curated mod list**: Includes major mods such as Create, Ars Nouveau, Botany Pots, Tough As Nails and more.

### Gameplay Loop

1. Start by automating resource processing with Create.

2. Unlock magical knowledge and cast your first spells.

3. Integrate magic & machines: spell-powered contraptions, enchanted gear, magical production chains.

4. Expand, explore, build grand bases or world-spanning networks.

### Getting Started

- Minecraft Java Edition: 1.21.1

- Platform: NeoForge

- Supported environments: Client & Server

**Join our community on Discord for guides, tips and build showcases: [Discord](https://discord.gg/FMAzrzXCjH)**

_**Why CMM?
We update alongside each major Create and Ars Nouveau release, ensuring you get the latest content with stability.**_

Jump in, cast the first spell, spin the first cog, and build something memorable.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Some of the notable content:
- [Ars Nouveau](https://modrinth.com/mod/ars-nouveau)
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [Botany Pots](https://modrinth.com/mod/botany-pots)
- [Tough As Nails](https://modrinth.com/mod/tough-as-nails)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

NOTE: This modpack is actively updated for the current Version Create, but will be updated Along side [The Create Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
